entry.title: I swear i can wink without clicking my tongue, it’s involuntary at this point #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: Gods theyre so strong and I am so lucky #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: Like i think i know but also what the hell #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: Like I dont look that different how the fuck do you not recognize me #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: Please excuse my unironic use of radical in the year 2024 #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: BOUCHARD??? Are you fucking kidding me. Jonathan when i catch you #magnusprotocol #tma #transgender

entry.title: Everytime its like “how do you still work here” #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme
entry.content: Everytime its like “how do you still work here” #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: For context Im the meanest person in my workplace, i dont know what that person was talking about #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme
entry.content: For context Im the meanest person in my workplace, i dont know what that person was talking about #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: Stop yelling at minimum wage employees, its not that serious I promise #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: Like technically nothing went against policy, but some of it definitely went against common sense #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: Can yall tell that im slowly losing it? One of them asked what it was like to be in my forties… #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: Disclaimer: not effective if you ain’t autistic #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: Ah fuck the accent there just kinda jumped out huh? #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme
entry.content: Ah fuck the accent there just kinda jumped out huh? #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: It makes me wanna chew through bone, why would you come back?? #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme
entry.content: It makes me wanna chew through bone, why would you come back?? #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: Theres no easy solution cause if im buying clothes i want my clothes to be hot girl shit #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme
entry.content: Theres no easy solution cause if im buying clothes i want my clothes to be hot girl shit #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: They said i had to post this
entry.content: They said i had to post this

entry.title: A small number of them now call me Mom-yari i dont know what to do with this #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme
entry.content: A small number of them now call me Mom-yari i dont know what to do with this #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: Like babes if I, the queen of forgetting meds, can do it so can you #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme
entry.content: Like babes if I, the queen of forgetting meds, can do it so can you #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: Honestly kinda forgot i even made content #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: Thats $40 more than i have, what the fuck
entry.content: Thats $40 more than i have, what the fuck

entry.title: Ill be posting alot more now that i dont have pack up all my stuff #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: Also ignore the mild awkwardness as I relearn how to make content womp womp #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme
entry.content: Also ignore the mild awkwardness as I relearn how to make content womp womp #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: Ive never been so effortlessly demolished I doubt I’ll ever recover #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme
entry.content: Ive never been so effortlessly demolished I doubt I’ll ever recover #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: Ignore the dog hair on the mirror, its a problem with no solutions #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme
entry.content: Ignore the dog hair on the mirror, its a problem with no solutions #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme

entry.title: After i got done record my partner said its cause im old #transgender #genderfluid #transfemme
